exploration_notes: The channel creation pipeline starts with `Channel` (base class in lib/surface/channel.h), with `LegacyChannel` and `ClientChannel` as concrete implementations. `ClientChannel` (client_channel/client_channel.h) orchestrates name resolution via `Resolver`/`ResolverFactory` (resolver/resolver.h, resolver/resolver_factory.h) and load balancing via `LoadBalancingPolicy` (load_balancing/lb_policy.h). Subchannel allocation is in client_channel/subchannel.h (`Subchannel` class). The two key LB policies
